subject: Release sli/core version 0.5.0
commit_message:
Release sli/core version 0.5.0

Release sli/core version 0.5.0 via new self release process

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dtimoney@att.com>

Patch Set 1:

Thanks, Jess!  I wasn't sure if the 'project' field in the yaml had to match the gerrit project (e.g. ccsdk/sli/core) or if the hyphenated version (e.g. ccsdk-sli-core).  I assumed the latter, which is passing the verify build so hopefully I guessed right?

I appreciate the need to test the new process, but CCSDK release deliverables for the El Alto early code drop need to be released this morning in order for the CCSDK and SDNC docker images to be ready for Monday morning, per deadline.  Please advise whether I can merge this morning or if I need to fall back to support ticket method of release.
